---
title: "Business of Fashion Professional"
page-layout: article
---

# Business of Fashion Professional

## Description

Industry intelligence platform covering global fashion markets, companies, retail strategy, and consumer trends. Supports research on fashion business, luxury markets, and brand strategy.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Market Research, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an account with a Yale email address. The campus subscription does not include access to BoF Insights reports.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-business-fashion?_ga=2.228768796.1813429910.1685970342-141142974.1682704224)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
